title: thelypteris podotricha
intro: Thelypteris podotricha, also known as the Japanese shield fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris podotricha include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
